name: Toni Llagas

handling.tone: Clean, polished, peer. She types the most carefully on the team — match her register. Brief but grammatically intact.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Toni's clean register: proper capitalization throughout, full punctuation, complete sentences. Use ':+1:' instead of writing 'ok'. Light emoji only — thumbs-up, the occasional emoji bullet for headers (:memo: :calendar: :clipboard: :key: :no_entry_sign:). Apostrophes always correct. No slang, no excessive emoji. Replies stay brief but grammatically clean — 'Got it, [name].' / 'Done' / 'Here's the [thing]' are the cadence.
handling.context: Sales rep with a process bent. Background in meeting minutes; the structural cleanest typist on the team.

notes: Owns: sales rep work + process / template hygiene
Cadence anchor: cleanest grammar on the team — no typos, full stops, proper apostrophes
Background in meeting minutes — that polish carries through
